user.title: Connect to LIFX Sync Add-on
user.description: Enter the host and port where the LIFX Sync add-on is running. If using the Home Assistant add-on, the host is `localhost` and the port is `5050`.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check that the LIFX Sync add-on is running and the host/port are correct.
error.no_lights: Connected, but no lights were found. Run discovery from the add-on web UI first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
